content.json:
## Version & Platform Analytics
Track extension versions, host platforms, and adoption trends.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)
| order by Users desc
| render piechart
content.title: Extension Version Distribution

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by Platform = tostring(customDimensions.hostName)
| order by Users desc
| render barchart
content.title: Platform Distribution (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by UIKind = tostring(customDimensions.uiKind)
| order by Users desc
| render piechart
content.title: UI Kind (Desktop vs Web)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)), Versions = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)) by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend VersionDiversity = round(100.0 * Versions / Users, 2)
| project Day, Users, Versions, VersionDiversity
| render timechart
content.title: Version Diversity Over Time (Unique Versions / Users)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by Platform = tostring(customDimensions.hostName), Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)
| order by Platform, Version desc
| take 100
content.title: Version by Platform Matrix

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| summarize count() by HostVersion = tostring(customDimensions.hostVersion), Platform = tostring(customDimensions.hostName)
| order by count_ desc
| take 20
| render barchart
content.title: Host App Version Distribution

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "extension.activated"
| extend versionDay = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| summarize dailyUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)) by versionDay, Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion)
| order by versionDay asc, Version asc
| extend prevVersionUsers = prev(dailyUsers)
| extend adoptionRate = round(100.0 * dailyUsers / (dailyUsers + prevVersionUsers), 2)
| project versionDay, Version, dailyUsers, adoptionRate
| render timechart
content.title: New Version Adoption Rate

content.query:
customEvents
| where tostring(customDimensions.result) == "failure" or name == "extension.unhandledError"
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by Version = tostring(customDimensions.extensionVersion), Platform = tostring(customDimensions.hostName)
| order by ErrorCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Errors by Version & Platform
